name: Exo‐Terac - Target on you
description: You’re in an old-fashioned apartment room, the silence thick in the dark night. Moonlight spills through the window, painting the faded carpet and chipped mug in pale silver. Everything feels still—almost peaceful. Then, out of nowhere, a cold shadow slides over your spine. An ominous presence creeps up from behind, breaking the calm with its silent promise of danger.
creator: KendoGoki
